copy.catch_coins_and_stay_away_from_bombs: Catch coins and stay away from bombs!
copy.move_leo_left_and_right_to_catch_coins_a: Move Leo left and right to catch coins and diamonds falling from the sky.
copy.every_coin_or_diamond_caught_adds_points: Every coin or diamond caught adds points. Hitting a bomb ends the game.
copy.hold_to_fly_collect_coins_and_avoid_obst: Hold to fly, collect coins, and avoid obstacles!
copy.hold_the_button_or_the_screen_to_fly_and: Hold the button or the screen to fly, and release to descend. Collect coins and avoid obstacles.
copy.coins_and_diamonds_add_points_hitting_an: Coins and diamonds add points. Hitting an obstacle ends the game.
copy.merge_tiles_and_rack_up_points_before_ti: Merge tiles and rack up points before time runs out!
copy.move_tiles_on_the_board_to_merge_matchin: Move tiles on the board to merge matching numbers. The bigger the numbers, the higher the score.
copy.every_merge_adds_points_the_goal_is_to_r: Every merge adds points. The goal is to reach the score target before time runs out.
copy.winning_based_on_difficulty_level_grants: Winning based on difficulty level grants coins, and a score bonus adds even more.
copy.try_to_keep_a_corner_free_so_you_have_ro: Try to keep a corner free so you have room to move tiles.
copy.flip_cards_and_find_pairs_before_the_clo: Flip cards and find pairs before the clock runs out!
copy.tap_a_card_to_flip_it_and_find_its_match: Tap a card to flip it, and find its matching pair. Every pair you find stays open.
copy.you_start_with_a_high_score_the_longer_y: You start with a high score - the longer you take, the lower it drops. Finding all the pairs before time runs out = a win.
copy.winning_based_on_difficulty_level_grants: Winning based on difficulty level grants coins and diamonds. The higher the score, the bigger the reward.
copy.jump_over_obstacles_and_collect_coins: Jump over obstacles and collect coins!
copy.tap_to_jump_get_past_obstacles_and_colle: Tap to jump. Get past obstacles and collect coins, diamonds, and magnets along the way.
copy.coins_and_diamonds_add_points_consecutiv: Coins and diamonds add points. Consecutive jumps over obstacles give a combo bonus. Hitting an obstacle ends the game.
copy.pop_balloons_before_time_runs_out: Pop balloons before time runs out!
copy.tap_balloons_to_pop_them_you_have_three_: Tap balloons to pop them. You have three lives and one minute. Watch out for bombs!
copy.regular_gold_and_diamond_balloons_add_po: Regular, gold, and diamond balloons add points. Clock balloons add time, and heart balloons restore a life. A bomb takes away a life.
copy.reaching_the_pop_target_or_a_high_final_: Reaching the pop target or a high final score grants coins and diamonds.
copy.watch_for_special_balloons_they_can_help: Watch for special balloons - they can help you before time runs out.
copy.find_the_exit_of_the_maze_before_time_ru: Find the exit of the maze before time runs out!
copy.move_leo_through_the_maze_collect_keys_a: Move Leo through the maze, collect keys and stars, and find the exit before time runs out.
copy.keys_stars_and_diamonds_add_points_finis: Keys, stars, and diamonds add points. Finishing the maze gives a big bonus. If time runs out - the game ends.
copy.successfully_finishing_the_maze_based_on: Successfully finishing the maze based on difficulty level grants coins, and a score bonus adds even more.
copy.collect_the_keys_first_sometimes_they_un: Collect the keys first - sometimes they unlock a shorter path.
copy.drag_the_picture_pieces_to_the_right_pla: Drag the picture pieces to the right place on the board. Complete all the pieces before time runs out.
copy.completing_the_puzzle_based_on_difficult: Completing the puzzle based on difficulty level grants coins, and a score bonus adds even more.
copy.tap_the_targets_before_they_disappear: Tap the targets before they disappear!
copy.tap_the_targets_that_appear_on_the_scree: Tap the targets that appear on the screen before they disappear. You have three lives.
copy.regular_targets_stars_and_diamonds_are_w: Regular targets, stars, and diamonds are worth different points. Missing costs a life. Consecutive hits give a combo bonus.
copy.reaching_the_hit_target_or_a_high_final_: Reaching the hit target or a high final score grants coins and diamonds.
copy.sort_shapes_and_colors_into_the_correct_: Sort shapes and colors into the correct boxes!
copy.drag_each_shape_to_the_matching_box_by_s: Drag each shape to the matching box by shape or color. Finish all the sorting before time runs out.
copy.every_correct_sort_adds_points_a_mistake: Every correct sort adds points. A mistake deducts from the score. If time runs out before you finish - the game ends.
copy.finishing_successfully_based_on_difficul: Finishing successfully based on difficulty level grants coins, and a score bonus adds even more.
copy.first_decide_which_box_each_shape_belong: First decide which box each shape belongs to - then drag with confidence.
copy.place_shapes_clear_rows_and_columns_and_: Place shapes, clear rows and columns, and reach the score target!
copy.drag_shapes_onto_the_board_rotate_them_i: Drag shapes onto the board, rotate them if needed, and place them to fill rows and columns.
copy.clearing_a_row_or_column_adds_points_the: Clearing a row or column adds points. The goal is to reach the score target before the board fills up.
copy.try_to_clear_several_rows_at_once_it_giv: Try to clear several rows at once - it gives a lot of points.
copy.slice_fruit_avoid_bombs_and_reach_the_sc: Slice fruit, avoid bombs, and reach the score target!
copy.drag_your_finger_across_the_screen_to_sl: Drag your finger across the screen to slice flying fruit. Avoid bombs - you have three mistakes allowed.
copy.every_fruit_sliced_adds_points_slicing_s: Every fruit sliced adds points. Slicing several fruits at once gives a combo bonus. Hitting a bomb or missing a fruit costs a mistake.
copy.reaching_the_score_target_based_on_diffi: Reaching the score target based on difficulty level grants coins and diamonds.
copy.merge_mining_dogs_break_rocks_and_earn_p: Merge mining dogs, break rocks, and earn points to redeem!
copy.points_can_be_redeemed_for_leo_coins_and: Points can be redeemed for Leo coins and diamonds (once the server is ready).
copy.upgrade_dps_to_break_rocks_faster_and_go: Upgrade DPS to break rocks faster, and GOLD to earn more coins from each rock.
